channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ro Khanna's Israel Stunt
item.description: The California representative appeared eager to provoke a confrontation to boost his likely presidential campaign.

item.title: Trump reduces Utah monuments by nearly 3 million acres
item.description: President Trump signed two executive orders on Monday, cutting nearly 3 million acres from Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monuments.

item.title: Bring Back the Founders' Senate
item.description: A new congressional proposal to restore state legislature selection of U.S. senators deserves conservative support.

item.title: Why Europe's Green Entrepreneurial State Went Bust
item.description: The EU's Green Deal has led to deindustrialization, fiscal strain, and failed prestige projects.
